name: Khalid Al-Thani
whatsapp_message: مرحبا خالد 👋 أتمنى أن تكون بخير! لاحظنا أن درجتك في الاختبار الأخير 65/100، وعندك 6 أيام قادمة لتحسينها 💪 هل تحتاج لأي مساعدة أو شرح إضافي قبل الاختبار القادم؟
action: Call or message Khalid today to introduce yourself, assess his understanding of challenging topics, and create a targeted study plan for the next 6 days.
reasoning: Khalid is at high risk (60/100) with below-passing quiz performance despite perfect attendance, indicating motivation but knowledge gaps. He has never been contacted by a facilitator, so establishing initial contact and support is critical to prevent further decline.
